nodes.speaker: Rubik
nodes.text:
Welcome to DFWTF. I'm Rubik.
Try not to break anything.

nodes.speaker: Rubik
nodes.text:
Yeah, sure it is.
Your first case is on your desk.

nodes.speaker: Rubik
nodes.text:
Dallas-Fort Worth Task Force.
We handle the weird stuff.

choices.text: Say no more. I got this.

nodes.speaker: Rubik
nodes.text:
Sure you do. Case file's
on your desk. Try not to die.
